description_long: This is a round, shallow wicker basket with a natural tan color, featuring a tightly woven exterior and a slightly flared rim. Inside the basket, there is a white, crinkled paper liner that partially covers the interior surface. The basket contains several golden-brown French fries and round, breaded chicken nuggets, arranged loosely within. The weave of the basket is consistent and uniform, with a visible braided edge along the rim for added strength and decoration. The basket sits on a flat, circular white surface, which contrasts with its earthy tones. There are no visible handles, lids, or additional decorative elements on the basket.
description: A shallow, round wicker basket lined with white paper and filled with French fries and chicken nuggets. The basket has a braided rim and a natural tan color.
description_view_0: The basket is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the braided rim, white paper liner, and a clear view of the fries and nuggets inside.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the shallow depth and flared sides of the basket, with the food contents partially obscured by the rim.
description_view_2: A top-down perspective highlights the arrangement of fries and nuggets, as well as the even weave and braided rim of the basket.
description_view_3: Another side view similar to view 1, showing the basket's profile and the food contents nestled inside, with the rim and weave pattern clearly visible.
attribute_weave_pattern: plain, tight weave with a braided rim, consistent and uniform throughout
